steps.title: Identify the grammatical forms required
steps.content: The blank must provide: a subject noun in nominative case and plural number (multiple lawmakers did the designating) and a possessive phrase (showing the fossil belongs to the state). The fossil is singular—one state claims one official fossil.

steps.title: Apply the agreement and possessive rules
steps.content: ”Lawmakers designated the state's official fossil” provides plural nominative “lawmakers” for subject-verb agreement and singular possessive “state's” to express ownership. The other three choices either use “lawmaker's” (singular possessive instead of nominative) or “states” (plural instead of possessive). This matches choice B — B is correct.
